questions.question: He said, "I play games." → He said that he ___ games.
questions.explanation: 現在形は過去形に変わります

questions.question: He said, "I am playing games." → He said that he ___ games.
questions.explanation: 現在進行形は過去進行形に変わります

questions.question: He said, "I played games." → He said that he ___ games.
questions.explanation: 過去形は過去完了形に変わります

questions.question: He said, "I will play games." → He said that he ___ games.
He said, "I can play games." → He said that he ___ games.
She said, "I am happy." → She said that she ___ happy.
questions.explanation: 現在形のbe動詞は過去形に変わります

questions.question: He said, "I have finished." → He said that he ___.
questions.explanation: 現在完了形は過去完了形に変わります

questions.question: She said, "I may go." → She said that she ___ go.
He said, "I must go." → He said that he ___ go.
questions.explanation: must は間接話法で had to に変わります

questions.question: She said, "I was eating." → She said that she ___ eating.
questions.explanation: 過去進行形は間接話法で過去完了進行形 had been に変わります

questions.question: He said, "I have been here." → He said that he ___ been there.
questions.explanation: 現在完了形は間接話法で過去完了形 had に変わります

questions.question: She said, "I am going to travel." → She said that she ___ going to travel.
questions.explanation: am は間接話法で was に変わります
